allow: Bash(gh api "repos/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools/contents/" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name']\) for x in json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\)]" 2>&1)

Bash(gh api "repos/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools/contents/Manus Agent Tools & Prompt" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name'], '|', x['path']\) for x in json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\)]" 2>&1)

Bash(for dir in "Amp" "Cluely" "CodeBuddy Prompts" "Comet Assistant" "Emergent" "Google" "Junie" "Leap.new" "Lovable"; do echo "=== $dir ===" && gh api "repos/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools/contents/$dir" --jq '.[].name' 2>/dev/null; done)

Bash(for dir in "NotionAi" "Open Source prompts" "Orchids.app" "Perplexity" "Poke" "Qoder" "Replit" "Same.dev" "Trae"; do echo "=== $dir ===" && gh api "repos/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools/contents/$dir" --jq '.[].name' 2>/dev/null; done)

Bash(for dir in "Traycer AI" "VSCode Agent" "Warp.dev" "Xcode" "Z.ai Code" "dia" "v0 Prompts and Tools"; do echo "=== $dir ===" && gh api "repos/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools/contents/$dir" --jq '.[].name' 2>/dev/null; done)
